steps.title: Locate x = 8,500 on the elevation axis
steps.content: Find 8,500 feet on the horizontal axis—it lies midway between the 8,000 and 9,000 marks.

steps.title: Trace vertically to the line of best fit and read the temperature
steps.content: Moving vertically upward from 8,500 feet, the point meets the line of best fit at a temperature of approximately 39°F on the vertical axis. That matches choice B — B is correct.
